name: Flyweight Design Pattern
problem: Reduce memory usage by sharing common immutable state across many fine-grained objects.
steps: Separate intrinsic (shared) state from extrinsic (context) state.
Create a flyweight interface for operations using extrinsic state.
Implement concrete flyweights storing only intrinsic state.
Add a flyweight factory to cache and reuse flyweights.
Provide extrinsic data from clients at call time.
